name: 神马
description: SM Divine Horse (SM) English Introduction SM Divine Horse is never just a Meme coin. It is the dawn in the darkest hours of Crypto, and the value totem of the 2026 Year of the Red Horse era. When the crypto market turns cold, traditional assets take the lead, and "shitcoin" projects fade like a passing cloud, SM Divine Horse has built a solid consensus with tens of thousands of holder addresses, boasting a rock-solid market cap that breaks through the slump against the trend. With the galloping and groundbreaking posture of a "horse", it has crafted a unique cyber culture, emerging as the first community benchmark on BSC that continuously draws external traffic, propelling crypto beliefs to go mainstream and thrive. Powered by an intelligent burning mechanism, the token burn never stops—circulation dwindles by the day, and the price floor climbs steadily. A breakthrough in trading volume triggers a super burn event, unleashing 24-hour, 48-hour, and 4-day carnivals in succession, making the value snowball bigger and bigger. Bolstered by the tailwind of Binance Chinese version's rapid launch and the fortune of the Year of the Red Horse, the future of SM Divine Horse knows no bounds. Instead of reminiscing about the glory of the once-billion-dollar Meme coins, seize the opportunity of SM Divine Horse right now—that is the true meaning of our entry into Crypto: rallying momentum through consensus, walking alongside the Divine Horse, and marching together toward a feast of 10,000x value.
